name: Training Resource
notice: Fields with (*) are mandatory and must be completed in order to submit this form. Leaving optional fields blank will remove the relevant heading from the published resource/provider profile.

description.text: Name of the resource
URLs resolving to the resource.
Other persistent identifiers.
Node the resource belongs to.

A high-level description in fairly non-technical terms of a) what the Resource does, functionality it provides and Resources it enables to access, b) the benefit to a user/customer delivered by a Resource; benefits are usually related to alleviating pains (e.g., eliminate undesired outcomes, obstacles or risks) or producing gains (e.g. increased performance, social gains, positive emotions or cost saving), c) list of customers, communities, users, etc. using the Resource.
Date in which the resource was made available for discovery and access to others.
Type of the resource. One among: Service, DataSource, Adapter, InteroperabilityGuidelines, TrainingMaterial, DeployableApplication
The organisation that manages or delivers the Resource.
The name(s) of (all) the Provider(s) that manage or deliver the Resource in federated scenarios.
The keyword(s) or tag(s) used to describe the resource.
A license document that applies to this resource
SPDX License
A license document that applies to this content, typically indicated by URL.
The access status of a resource (open, restricted, paid).
The version date for the most recently published or broadcast resource.
The principal users(s) for which the learning resource was designed.
The predominant type or kind that characterizes the learning resource.
The descriptions of what knowledge, skills or abilities students should acquire on completion of the resource.
Target skill level in the topic being taught.
The predominant content type of the learning resource (video, game, diagram, slides, etc.).
Identification of certification, accreditation or badge obtained with course or learning resource.
Approximate or typical time it takes to work with or through the learning resource for the typical intended target audience.
The language in which the resource was originally published or made available.
A named group of Providers that offer access to the same type of Resources.
A named group of Providers that offer access to the same type of Resources, within the defined domain.
The main researchers involved in producing the data, or the authors of the publication, in priority order. To supply multiple creators, repeat this property.
The first name of the creator.
The last name of the creator.
Email of the creator.
Uniquely identifies an individual or legal entity, according to various schemes.
Uniquely identifies the organizational affiliation of the creator.
The organizational or institutional affiliation of the creator.
Uniquely identifies the organizational affiliation of the creator.
List of public contact emails.
